title: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs.
h1: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor: Complete Comparison
intro: Mailchimp and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp excels at offering a free tier and affordable entry point for small businesses, while Campaign Monitor specializes in multi-brand management for agencies. Your choice depends on your budget, team size, and whether you need a completely free solution.
choose_a_if: You need a completely free email marketing solution with no subscriber limits imposed on the free tier
You're a beginner or small business owner looking for an affordable, easy-to-use platform with built-in landing pages
You want access to extensive automation, A/B testing, and audience segmentation features at a low entry price
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts and need dedicated multi-brand management features
You're an agency looking for a journey designer and smart segmentation capabilities
You need professional transactional email functionality built into your email marketing tool

faq.q: Is Mailchimp better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp is better for beginners and small businesses thanks to its free tier and affordability. Campaign Monitor excels for agencies managing multiple brands with its dedicated multi-brand features and journey designer. Mailchimp has a slight edge overall due to lower barriers to entry.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Mailchimp is significantly cheaper, offering a completely free plan for up to 500 subscribers and paid plans starting at $13/month. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month, making it immediately costly even for small campaigns.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and campaign data. Both Mailchimp and Campaign Monitor support standard export formats, making migration relatively straightforward. However, you'll need to rebuild your automation workflows and templates in Mailchimp.
